title: Epitaph.
content:
Here lies a man cut off by fate
    Too soon for all good men;
    For sextons he died late too late
    For those who wield the pen.
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
